original_snippet_context: Discussion about exchange rates, banking behavior, and market conditions amidst recent panics.
relevant_quote: Os bancos não alteraram e se mantiveram as tabellas de 15 5/16 e 17 1/16 d., sendo esta no do Brasil e aquella nos estrangeiros, os quaes corriam para os saques respectivamente; contra letras a 15 3/16 d., a que compravam.
justification: The text merely reports exchange rate figures and banking practices, without offering an opinion about any specific proposal like the "Caixa de Conversão" or expressing any expansionist or orthodox views on monetary policy.
